red_baseline.summary: The readiness harness initially failed only because scripts/run-agent-evidence.js was absent.

validation.summary: 9/9 evidence contracts and syntax checks pass; raw evidence is digest-verified and no broad readiness result is emitted.

review.evidence: Exact-cell validation preserves missing/non-ready visibility and rejects unsupported roll-up fields.

obligation_evidence.evidence: Schema and runner bind every cell to one exact surface/host/platform/build/scenario and expose no broad readiness boolean or host/OS inference.

recovery: Relaxed cellId continuation characters for lowercase build-digest fragments and added live raw-evidence digest verification.
